MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Amanda Ebey, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Kendra Crawford, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Cindy Lee representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Alberta Nash is present.
George Gigounas representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed.

This case settled, the trial date of April 1, 2008 is vacated.
